failure_modes.text: Teams can soften conflict language enough to avoid argument while still failing to make the real boundary or trade-off discussable.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams smooth over the sharp edge of disagreement so much that real boundaries, trade-offs, or accountability requests never become explicit.
failure_modes.mitigation: After collaborative dialogue, verify that the real trade-off or boundary was stated, not just softened into vagueness: ask each party to restate what was decided and what was given up.

failure_modes.text: A favored interpretation can harden into rigidity and block the open, non-judgmental listening the model depends on.
failure_modes.mitigation: Practice active listening audits: periodically check whether each participant can accurately paraphrase the other's position before responding to it.

failure_modes.text: Groups can mistake collaborative tone for good decision hygiene and still drift into groupthink or weak challenge.
failure_modes.mitigation: Distinguish process tone from decision rigor: after any consensus reached through collaborative communication, run a quick devil's advocate check to confirm the group did not drift into unchallenged agreement.

premortem_questions.text: Are we trying to convince each other that we are right, or are we trying to hear each perspective to figure out what is true and what to do?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Are we going to try to convince each other that we are right or are we going to open-mindedly hear each other’s perspectives to try to figure out what’s true and what to do about it?

premortem_questions.text: What would we have to believe for the opposite viewpoint to be true?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would we have to believe for the opposite viewpoint to be true?

premortem_questions.text: If our audience remembers only one thing, what should it be?
premortem_questions.source_quote: If our audience remembers only one thing, what should it be?

heuristics.text: Check both the content level and the relationship level before deciding what the conversation actually needs next.
heuristics.source_quote: Always operate at two levels: the analytical content and the relationship tension.

heuristics.text: Lead with objective observation and impact before inviting joint problem solving.
heuristics.source_quote: Provide Information ... Detail the Impact ... Extend an Invitation

heuristics.text: Use the most respectful interpretation available so the exchange can stay direct without becoming needlessly adversarial.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on content-relationship dual attention, respectful directness, and anti-groupthink communication discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor facilitation sprawl beyond the raw source's clearer clarity, feedback, and anti-rigidity material.
open_questions: The second failure mode compresses several source passages about confirmation, rigidity, and challenged assumptions so the intervention stays reusable.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on emotional intelligence, critical-thinking, radical transparency, and storytelling.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strongest on inside-view distortion, curse-of-knowledge, and fast defensive filtering.
structured_tensions: The source contains an explicit structured tension block naming commitment-and-consistency-bias, authority-bias, and confirmation-bias.
